# Trust Layer for Inclusive Fintech Strategic Brief

Version: `1.0.0`
Category: Accion Trust by Design Fintech Challenge / student_partner_track
Deadline: 2026-06-05 23:59 EDT
Production readiness: 100%

## Winning Thesis

Trust Layer for Inclusive Fintech should be judged by its ability to turn opportunity rules into running workflows, traceable evidence, and submission-ready artifacts.

## Proof Priorities

- show the product operating end to end;
- make AI decisions inspectable through generated artifacts;
- tie every claim to an evidence slot;
- keep external submission automation receipt-backed;
- remove private applicant data from public artifacts.

## Strongest Evidence


## Competitive Frame

Position against manual operations and generic AI tooling by emphasizing domain-specific rules, evidence boundaries, and automation receipts.

## Closing Line

Trust Layer for Inclusive Fintech turns deadline pressure into a repeatable AI operations workflow with checklists, evidence, payloads, and receipts.
